scenario: A synthetic plugin allocation storm exceeds its worker memory budget, repeated failures quarantine the installation, and an operator validates explicit recovery.
remainingLimitations: This was an accountless public synthetic tabletop and did not use a live Cloudflare deployment or customer traffic.
Paid-plan runtime enforcement, live notification delivery, and external provider coordination remain unverified.
Production thresholds must be selected from observed deployment behavior and were not invented for this drill.
